# Pull Request

Thank you for your contribution! Please fill out the following:

## Description

A short summary of what changed and why.

## Related Issue

Link to the issue this PR addresses (if any).

## 2FA Scope

- [ ] TOTP generation
- [ ] HOTP generation
- [ ] QR code generation
- [ ] OTP validation
- [ ] Provider profile behavior (Google / Microsoft / Custom)
- [ ] Generator form / setup flow
- [ ] UI/UX only
- [ ] Docs only

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have added tests where applicable
- [ ] I have verified OTP behavior for expected timing windows and/or counter progression (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the documentation if needed
- [ ] I did not include real production 2FA secrets or QR payloads

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Include before/after or gif if useful.

If screenshot work is unfinished, add placeholder notes so follow-up tasks are clear.

---

Please ensure the CI passes before requesting review.
